summary: Iteration 27 Testing: Barrister View and PDF Export Features. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed: Barrister View button and Export PDF button present in ReportsSection, report dates show correctly (not 'Invalid Date'), iOS PDF export fix implemented, mobile-friendly header classes in place.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/{report_id}/export-docx returns valid DOCX (starts with PK)
Backend: /api/cases/{case_id}/reports returns reports with generated_at date field
Backend: /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds returns grounds array with proper structure
Backend: Single report endpoint returns content.analysis
Backend: Case endpoint returns case data with title and defendant_name
Frontend: ReportsSection contains 'Barrister View' button with data-testid
Frontend: ReportsSection contains 'Export PDF' button with data-testid
Frontend: Report dates display correctly (e.g., '5 Mar 2026, 04:23 pm')
Frontend: BarristerView has iOS PDF export fix (window.open for iOS)
Frontend: BarristerView has mobile-friendly header (hidden sm:inline classes)
critical_code_review_comments: BarristerView.jsx Line 53: Grounds fix confirmed - setGrounds(groundsRes.data?.grounds || []) correctly extracts grounds from API response
BarristerView.jsx Lines 77-80: iOS PDF export fix - uses window.open(url, '_blank') for iPad/iPhone/iPod
BarristerView.jsx Lines 256-257: Mobile-friendly PDF button - 'Export' text hidden on small screens
BarristerView.jsx Lines 263, 273: Word and Print buttons hidden on mobile (hidden sm:flex)
ReportsSection.jsx Lines 301-310: Barrister View button with proper data-testid per report
ReportsSection.jsx Lines 311-320: Export PDF button with proper data-testid per report
ReportsSection.jsx Line 60-100: handleExportPDF function with iOS detection for proper download behavior
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user case with 10 reports and 14 grounds
context_for_next_testing_agent: Barrister View page accessible at /cases/{caseId}/reports/{reportId}/barrister. Export PDF/DOCX endpoints work correctly. Session token may have expired - create new session if needed. iOS PDF export opens in new tab. Report dates display correctly.

barrister_view.ios_pdf_export: Fixed - uses window.open for iOS devices

backend_exports.docx_export: Returns valid DOCX (ZIP format with PK header)
backend_exports.content_disposition: Both set attachment header for download

bug_fixes_verified.quick_print_not_working_on_iphone: Fixed - iOS detection opens PDF in new tab instead of programmatic download
bug_fixes_verified.pdf_export_wanted: Implemented - Export PDF button added to ReportsSection and Barrister View header
